name: ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card
joiningBenefits: 2,000 Reward Points upon card activation and payment of joining fee
Rs 100 cashback on HP Pay app upon first successful fuel transaction of min Rs 1,000
additionalBenefits: 5% savings on HPCL fuel purchases: 4% cashback plus 1% fuel surcharge waiver
Additional 1.5% benefit as reward points on HP Pay app fuel purchases at HPCL outlets
25% discount on BookMyShow and INOX movie tickets (minimum 2 tickets), capped at Rs 100 twice a month, subject to spending Rs 25,000 in the preceding calendar quarter
additionalDetails: 1% fuel surcharge waiver applies to transactions up to Rs 4,000 at HPCL petrol pumps
A transaction fee of 1% applies to utility payments exceeding Rs 50,000 per month
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver product page and terms.
Annual fee of Rs 500 is waived on spending Rs 1.5 Lakhs or more in the previous anniversary year.
Fuel spends earn 4% cashback capped at Rs 200 per month, plus 1% surcharge waiver on transactions up to Rs 4,000.
Utilities, departmental stores, and grocery spends earn 5% back (20 points per Rs 100 spent) with a shared cap of 400 points (value of Rs 100) per statement cycle.
Complimentary domestic airport lounge access (1 visit per quarter) requires a minimum spend of Rs 75,000 in the previous calendar quarter.
BookMyShow movie discount (25% off up to Rs 100 twice a month on min 2 tickets) requires spending Rs 25,000 in the preceding spends quarter (effective April 1, 2026).
